new_classes.label_en: Other still wine (variety/vintage designation, no PDO/PGI), actual alcoholic strength ≤ 15% vol, in containers > 10 l (CN 2204 29 96)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Stillwein (Rebsorte/Jahrgang, kein g.U./g.g.A.), tatsächlicher Alkoholgehalt ≤ 15 % vol, in Behältnissen mit mehr als 10 l (KN 2204 29 96)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing a variety or vintage designation but without a Protected Designation of Origin (PDO/g.U.) or Protected Geographical Indication (PGI/g.g.A.), with an actual alcoholic strength not exceeding 15% vol, put up in containers holding more than 10 litres. Classified under CN 2204 29 96. The non-volatile constituents of the total dry extract include sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts, as per additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the key discriminating criteria for CN 2204 29 96: (1) wine of fresh grapes (parent class WineFreshGrapesGrapeMust2204), (2) variety or vintage designation present (VarietyOrVintageWineQuality), (3) absence of PDO (complement PDOWineQuality), (4) absence of PGI (complement PGIWineQuality), (5) actual alcoholic strength ≤ 15% vol (decimalRange maxInclusive 15.0), (6) containers > 10 l (LargeContainerOver10L, existing TBox class), and (7) not sparkling / not semi-sparkling (complements). The legal note references additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22 regarding the composition of total dry extract (non-volatile constituents: sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter, salts). This compositional detail (TotalDryExtractQuality exists in TBox) is informational/definitional for the analytical test rather than a classifying criterion distinguishing 22042996 from its siblings; it cannot be further operationalised as a differential OWL restriction without additional datatype properties for each constituent. This accounts for the small coverage gap (~0.18). All structural discriminators (container size, PDO/PGI absence, variety/vintage presence, alcoholic strength, non-sparkling) are covered.
